title: penstemon × crideri
intro: Penstemon × crideri, a hybrid of the penstemon genus, is a flowering plant that combines characteristics of its parent species. It is native to the southwestern United States and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting infections. In herbal preparations, Penstemon × crideri is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be dried and used in infusions or powdered for topical applications.
